---
title: "Resources"
subtitle: "Papers, software, and links shared by workshop participants"
---

::: {.callout-note}
This page is maintained collectively by participants. To add a resource, edit this file on your group branch and open a pull request — or pass the details to an organizer.
:::

---

## Papers

### Survival Analysis

| Authors | Title | Journal | Link |
|---------|-------|---------|------|
| Putter, Fiocco & Geskus | Tutorial in biostatistics: competing risks and multi-state models | *Statistics in Medicine* (2007) | [PDF](../assets/literature/Survival%20analysis/SiM%20-%202006%20-%20Putter%20-%20Tutorial%20in%20biostatistics%20competing%20risks%20and%20multi%E2%80%90state%20models.pdf) |
| Kragh Andersen et al. | Analysis of time-to-event for observational studies | *Statistics in Medicine* (2020) | [PDF](../assets/literature/Survival%20analysis/Statistics%20in%20Medicine%20-%202020%20-%20Kragh%20Andersen%20-%20Analysis%20of%20time%E2%80%90to%E2%80%90event%20for%20observational%20studies%20Guidance%20to%20the%20use.pdf) |
| Pohar Perme, de Wreede & Manevski | What is relative survival and what is its role in haematology? | *Best Practice & Research Clinical Haematology* (2023) | [PDF](../assets/literature/Survival%20analysis/PoharPerme_relsurv2023.pdf) |

### Infectious Disease Modelling

| Authors | Title | Journal | Link |
|---------|-------|---------|------|
| Grassly & Fraser | Mathematical models of infectious disease transmission | *Nature Reviews Microbiology* (2008) | [PDF](../assets/literature/Infectious%20diseases/Grassly_Nat2008.pdf) |
| Lipsitch | Challenges of vaccine effectiveness and waning studies | *Clinical Infectious Diseases* (2019) | [PDF](../assets/literature/Infectious%20diseases/Lipsitch%202019.pdf) |
| Cori et al. | A new framework and software to estimate time-varying reproduction numbers | *American Journal of Epidemiology* (2013) | |
| Wallinga & Lipsitch | How generation intervals shape the relationship between growth rates and reproductive numbers | *Proc. R. Soc. B* (2007) | |

### Dynamic Survival Analysis

| Authors | Title | Journal | Link |
|---------|-------|---------|------|
| KhudaBukhsh et al. | Survival dynamical systems: individual-level survival analysis from population-level epidemic models | *Interface Focus* (2019) | [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1098/rsfs.2019.0048) |
| di Lauro et al. | Dynamic survival analysis for non-Markovian epidemic models | *arXiv* (2022) | [DOI](https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2202.09948) |

### Pairwise Survival

| Authors | Title | Journal | Link |
|---------|-------|---------|------|
| Sharker et al. | Pairwise accelerated failure time regression models for infectious disease transmission in close-contact groups with external sources of infection | *arXiv* (2019) | [DOI](https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.1901.04916) |

### Ten Simple Rules

| Authors | Title | Journal | Link |
|---------|-------|---------|------|
| Palagi, Schwartz, Markel & Ouellette | Ten simple rules for writing a PLOS Computational Biology quick tips article | *PLOS Computational Biology* (2023) | [Article](https://journals.plos.org/ploscompbiol/article?id=10.1371/journal.pcbi.1011689) |
| Knapp et al. | Ten Simple Rules for a Successful Cross-Disciplinary Collaboration | *PLOS Computational Biology* (2015) | [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pcbi.1004214) |
| Bodner, Brimacombe, Chenery et al. | Ten simple rules for tackling your first mathematical models: A guide for graduate students by graduate students | *PLOS Computational Biology* (2021) | [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pcbi.1008539) |

---

## Software

### Survival Analysis

| Package | Description | Link |
|---------|-------------|------|
| `survival` | Core survival analysis: KM, Cox, parametric models | [CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=survival) |
| `mstate` | Multi-state models and competing risks | [CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=mstate) |
| `flexsurv` | Flexible parametric survival models | [CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=flexsurv) |
| `cmprsk` | Competing risks: Fine–Gray model | [CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=cmprsk) |
| `icenReg` | Interval-censored regression | [CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=icenReg) |

### Infectious Disease Modelling

| Package | Description | Link |
|---------|-------------|------|
| `EpiEstim` | Time-varying reproduction number estimation | [CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=EpiEstim) |
| `EpiNow2` | Nowcasting and Rₜ estimation with delays | [CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=EpiNow2) |
| `deSolve` | ODE solvers for compartmental models | [CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=deSolve) |
| `coarseDataTools` | Doubly interval-censored incubation period estimation | [CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=coarseDataTools) |
| `epinowcast` | Nowcasting with reporting delays | [GitHub](https://github.com/epinowcast/epinowcast) |

---

## Tutorials and Lecture Notes

*Add links to useful tutorials, course notes, or worked examples here.*

---

## Datasets and Data Resources

*Add links to publicly available epidemic datasets or data repositories here.*

---

## Discovered During the Workshop

*Add anything useful that came up during discussions, group work, or presentations.*
